title: Tinallian cliff spider
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tinallian cliff spiders''' lived on the seaside cliffs of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tinallis]]. People climbing the cliffs to get at [[tresher]] nests had to contend with swarms of the creatures. [[Fendel Ramison]] was attacked by several spiders while trying to get a tresher [[Egg/Legends|egg]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
